title: Last Use Tooltip
description: Last Use Tooltip - smart item last-use timer for Forge 1.16.1-1.21.11.
body:
# ![star](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/2b50.svg) Last Use Tooltip

Make your inventory feel smarter, cleaner, and more modern.

Hover any item and instantly see:
- `Last used: 12 minutes ago`
- `Last used: 3 days ago`
- `Last used: never`

## ![sparkles](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/2728.svg) Why Players Love It
- ![crossed-swords](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/2694.svg) Faster combat loadout decisions
- ![pickaxe](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/26cf.svg) Better tool rotation for mining sessions
- ![backpack](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/1f392.svg) Cleaner inventory awareness without commands
- ![puzzle](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/1f9e9.svg) Vanilla-friendly quality-of-life upgrade

## ![brain](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/1f9e0.svg) What Gets Tracked
The timestamp updates when players:
- right-click with items
- right-click blocks/entities
- left-click blocks
- attack entities
- break blocks

## ![earth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/1f30d.svg) Compatibility
Supported via dedicated Forge releases for:
- 1.16.1
- 1.16.2
- 1.16.3
- 1.16.4
- 1.16.5
- 1.17.1
- 1.18.x (1.18, 1.18.1, 1.18.2)
- 1.19.x (1.19 through 1.19.4)
- 1.20.x (1.20 through 1.20.4, plus 1.20.6)
- 1.21.x (1.21 through 1.21.11)

## ![gear](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/2699.svg) Technical Notes
- Per-item timestamp storage
- Lightweight runtime behavior
- No repeating tasks
- Drop-in installation

## ![rocket](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/svg/1f680.svg) Install
1. Download the file for your exact Minecraft version.
2. Put it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch and hover items to see last-use info.

Enjoy the tiny detail that makes a big gameplay difference.
